name: quidest.ro
description: The app acts as the frontend interface for a WordPress blog.
It utilizes GraphQL to fetch data from the WordPress blog.
The blog is optimized for SEO, dynamically generating all tags for every page.
The sitemap is dynamically generated, incorporating the routes of WordPress articles as well as the pages in the frontend app.

name: dictionarurban.ro
description: The app serves as an interactive dictionary for informal expressions.
It leverages Supabase for backend operations, including user authentication and database management.
Features a like system and a report system for expressions.

The app's dashboard provides a professional platform for administrators to effectively manage dictionary content and user activities. It enables the quick approval, rejection, deletion, or restoration of submissions, and facilitates user account management.

name: To-do List
description: The app acts as a todo list for users.
It utilizes Supabase for efficient backend operations including user authentication and database management.
Every todo can have a different color and can be edited, deleted, or marked as solved.
